objective: Prove the complete authority, TTL, attempt, review, quarantine, and reporting contracts before any Stage 1 provider call.
campaign_variant_override: Stage 1 uses exactly four variants per root; the eventual Stage 2 campaign target remains eight to sixteen.
required_gates: Strict raw provider schemas reject every authority field at every nesting depth
Harness derives and persists TTL from one frozen scenario clock while enforcing a separate wall-clock run lease
Pinned executable oracle and effect-receipt verifier are re-executed against trusted scenario truth before terminal completion
Atomic deterministic work claims enforce total and per-role limits and never retry indeterminate work
Six packs use isolated artifact and semantic-dedup namespaces
Critic inputs are blinded and adjudication occurs only on measured disagreement
Critic confusion matrices and adjudicator resolution counts are reconstructed from immutable artifacts rather than hard-coded accuracy
Advisory reviewers cannot alter mechanically derived proposal or episode truth
Structured quarantine and immutable content-addressed reports are owner-private
Mock report proves zero provider transport calls, zero training writes, and exact accepted counts
Crash/replay, concurrency, TTL, authority, duplicate, receipt, quarantine, and report adversarial tests pass
next_gate: A separate exact-head Codex authorization is required before creating or executing a live Stage 1 manifest.
